# Hermes A2A Plugin — Full Context for LLMs

This file contains the complete project documentation in a single document
for maximum LLM comprehension. Source: https://github.com/maisonnat/hermes-a2a-plugin

## Project Overview

**Hermes A2A Plugin** is a standard Hermes Agent plugin that adds A2A (Agent2Agent)
protocol support. It runs an HTTP server that publishes an Agent Card and accepts
task delegations from any A2A-compatible agent (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex).

## 🔌 Plugin System Integration

### plugin.yaml
name: hermes-a2a
version: 0.1.0
description: A2A protocol support for Hermes Agent
provides_tools: a2a_serve, a2a_status, a2a_stop
provides_hooks: session_start, session_end, pre_tool, post_tool
provides_commands: a2a

### Registration (__init__.py)
```python
def register(ctx):
    # Lifecycle hooks
    ctx.register_hook("session_start", on_session_start)
    ctx.register_hook("session_end", on_session_end)
    ctx.register_hook("pre_tool", on_pre_tool)
    ctx.register_hook("post_tool", on_post_tool)
    
    # LLM-callable tools
    ctx.register_tool(name="a2a_serve", schema=..., handler=...)
    ctx.register_tool(name="a2a_status", schema=..., handler=...)
    ctx.register_tool(name="a2a_stop", schema=..., handler=...)
    
    # CLI subcommand
    ctx.register_cli_command(name="a2a", ...)
```

### Available Tool Schemas (schemas.py)
- a2a_serve(port=4097, host="127.0.0.1", token="") → Start A2A server
- a2a_status() → Check server status
- a2a_stop() → Stop A2A server

## 🏗️ A2A Server Architecture (server.py)

### Endpoints
| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| GET | /health | Health check → {"status": "ok"} |
| GET | /.well-known/agent-card.json | Agent Card with capabilities |
| POST | /tasks/send | Accept A2A task delegation |

### Agent Card Structure
```json
{
  "name": "Hermes Agent",
  "description": "Self-improving AI agent with persistent memory...",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "capabilities": {"streaming": true},
  "skills": [{
    "id": "hermes_general",
    "name": "General Purpose Agent",
    "tags": ["research", "coding", "automation"],
    "examples": ["Implement a REST API", "Debug Python error"]
  }]
}
```

### Task Lifecycle
Received task → JSON-RPC 2.0 parse → Extract text →
Bridge.process_task() → Wait for result →
Return A2A response with status + artifacts

## 🔗 Bridge Architecture (bridge.py)

### Current (MVP)
```python
class HermesTaskBridge:
    def process_task(self, task_id, text):
        # Stub: echoes back the text
        return f"Received: {text}"
```

### Target (TODO)
```python
# 1. Create Hermes session: SessionDB.create(task_id)
# 2. Run: AIAgent.run_conversation(user_input=text)
# 3. Capture streaming progress
# 4. Package response as A2A artifact
```

## 📡 MCP Bridge (bridge_mcp.py — TODO)

An MCP server that OpenCode configures in opencode.jsonc:
```json
{"mcpServers": {"hermes-a2a": {"command": "python3", "args": ["-m", "hermes_a2a_plugin.bridge_mcp"]}}}
```

Exposes these MCP tools to OpenCode:
- hermes_delegate(text) → Delegates a task to Hermes via A2A
- hermes_search(query) → Searches via Hermes
- hermes_status() → Check Hermes availability

## 📦 Project Files

### Core Plugin
- hermes_a2a_plugin/__init__.py — 120 lines, register() + hooks + tools + CLI
- hermes_a2a_plugin/plugin.yaml — Plugin manifest
- hermes_a2a_plugin/schemas.py — LLM tool schemas
- hermes_a2a_plugin/server.py — 195 lines, HTTP server with A2A protocol
- hermes_a2a_plugin/bridge.py — 70 lines, task bridge stub

### Documentation
- docs/index.md — Home with architecture diagram
- docs/getting-started.md — Installation + quick start
- docs/guides/usage.md — Usage guide with examples
- docs/guides/configuration.md — Config reference
- docs/api/reference.md — Auto-generated API docs
- docs/research/python-a2a-sdk.md — SDK research

### Configuration
- mkdocs.yml — Material theme with logo, features
- mkdocs.yml plugins — search, gen-files, mkdocstrings
- .github/workflows/docs.yml — Auto-deploy to GitHub Pages

### Build & Config
- pyproject.toml — Setuptools build, MIT license
- Makefile — install, docs, serve-docs, test, lint
- .gitignore — Python + OS + IDE ignores

## ⚡ Quick Commands
```bash
# Local
hermes plugins enable hermes-a2a
hermes a2a serve --port 4097

# Test
curl http://localhost:4097/health
curl http://localhost:4097/.well-known/agent-card.json
curl -X POST http://localhost:4097/tasks/send -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"params":{"id":"test","message":{"role":"user","parts":[{"text":"Hello"}]}}}'

# Dev
cd ~/Projects/hermes-a2a-plugin
source .venv/bin/activate
make install
make test
make serve-docs
```

## 📚 Dependencies
- Python 3.10+ (stdlib only for MVP — http.server, json, threading)
- Optional: Starlette + Uvicorn (production)
- Docs: mkdocs-material + mkdocstrings[python] + mkdocs-gen-files

## 🔒 Security
- Bearer token auth supported (--token flag)
- CORS headers enabled
- Auth validation via Authorization: Bearer header
- Default: no auth (localhost only)

## 🧪 Tests
5/5 passing:
- test_agent_card_structure — Required fields present
- test_agent_card_skill — Each skill has required fields
- test_server_init — Creates with defaults
- test_server_custom_port — Accepts custom config
- test_bridge — Process tasks correctly
